title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Ramky Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Ramky Group
jsonLd.description:
Ramky Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ramky Group:
Ramky Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ramky Group!
